description: A customer requests a service not covered by the standard tariff, such as providing a floating crane for a heavy lift. A manager must price and approve the service.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request for the special service.

expected_outcome.expected: Manager understands the customer's requirement for a floating crane.

nodes.task_description: Determine the cost of providing the service by getting quotes from subcontractors or calculating internal costs.

expected_outcome.expected: Manager determines the cost of the service will be $10,000.

nodes.task_description: Provide a formal quotation to the customer for their approval before arranging the service.

expected_outcome.expected: A quote is sent to the customer for the special service.
